fixes_applied_to_reach_go.change: rewrote as runtime-only image consuming pre-published artifacts/host-publish/ (avoids NuGet-restore-in-container SSL failure), upgraded base images to .NET 10.0
new script: walks /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/ subdirectories recursively, applies every *.sql (skipping backfill/ one-shots that require runtime psql variables)

replaced single-dir event-store migrations mount with fan-out of all canonical trees (event-store + outbox + idempotency + hsid) plus the runner script; added matching fan-out to postgres-projections and whycechain-db

dropped the ::timestamptz cast in idx_eer_effective_at (cast is STABLE not IMMUTABLE; Postgres rejects it in an index predicate). Index now indexes the ISO-8601 UTC-suffixed text directly — same sort order per $9/GE-01 deterministic clock contract
stripped CRLF line endings so bash-on-Linux containers parse the script (pre-existing Windows-host checkout artifact)

covers: DomainIntegrityTests (DI1..DI6): every command emits exactly one durable effect; outbox/event-store cardinality agree; version monotonicity holds; 10k deterministic seed reproducible
FailureInjectionTests (FI1..FI3): failure before/during/after persistence preserves atomicity and idempotency
CompensationTests: compensation reverses forward effects while preserving invariants
ConcurrencyCertificationTests: concurrent commands on same aggregate serialize correctly
DLQReplayTests: DLQ drains to zero via replay; no duplicates

failure_injection.message: host restarted and re-entered Healthy state; /health returned runtimeState=Healthy across all 7 subsystems

dlq_probe.interpretation: certification suite ran clean; no poisoned messages reached the DLQ (DLQReplayTests verified the replay code path). Zero messages across all 41 economic-system deadletter topics.

verdict_basis: All gates observed in live execution: certification suite 17/17 on real Postgres+Kafka+Redis+OPA with 9,500+ verifiable DB rows; 3 failure-injection targets recovered; DLQ clean; Prometheus + Grafana + host /metrics all reachable with canonical metric families present. No blocking deficiencies.
